Hero.subheadline: Led by Raj Rasaratnam, ARG Accountax provides professional, reliable, and bilingual tax services. We simplify complex tax and accounting and year round financial consulting so you can focus on what matters most.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: End-to-end tax support for every stage of your financial life.

personal.title: Personal Tax
personal.description: T1 returns, RRSP planning, deductions, and refund optimization for individuals and families.

selfEmployed.title: Self-Employed
selfEmployed.description: T2125 preparation, HST registration, business expense guidance, and quarterly planning.

corporate.title: Corporate / Small Business
corporate.description: T2 returns, CCPC tax planning, payroll, and year-end preparation for Ontario businesses.

WhyUs.title: Why Choose ARG Accountax?
WhyUs.subtitle: We go beyond filing — we help you understand and plan your taxes year-round.

experience.title: Ontario Expertise
experience.description: Deep knowledge of federal and Ontario-specific tax rules, credits, and deadlines.

proactive.title: Proactive Approach
proactive.description: We reach out before deadlines, not after. No surprises at tax time.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Service
bilingual.description: We serve clients in both English and Tamil — your comfort is our priority.

trusted.title: Trusted & Transparent
trusted.description: Flat-fee pricing with no hidden charges. You know what you pay before we start.

Tools.title: Free Tax Tools

incomeTax.title: Federal + Ontario Income Tax Calculator
incomeTax.description: Estimate your personal income tax with real-time Federal and Ontario calculations. Enter your employment income and RRSP contributions to see your tax breakdown.

rrsp.title: RRSP Contribution Room Estimator
rrsp.description: Estimate your RRSP contribution room based on your earned income. Includes over-contribution warnings and tax savings estimates.

deadlines.description: Key CRA and Ontario filing deadlines for personal, corporate, HST, and instalment payments.

Contact.title: Contact & Consultation
Contact.subtitle: Have questions about your Ontario personal or corporate taxes? Schedule a consultation or send us a message below.

accountant.name: Raj Rasaratnam
accountant.title: Principal Accountant
accountant.bio: Providing expert personal and corporate tax solutions across Ontario. Our mission is to simplify your tax obligations while maximizing your returns.

form.name: Full Name
form.consent: I consent to ARG Accountax contacting me regarding my inquiry. I understand that this communication does not constitute a formal accountant-client relationship until an engagement letter is signed.
form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We will be in touch within one business day.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at contact@taxraj.com.

rrspEstimator.title: RRSP Contribution Room Estimator
rrspEstimator.subtitle: 2025 tax year · Based on 2024 earned income
rrspEstimator.bufferWarning: You are {amount} over your contribution room, but within the $2,000 lifetime over-contribution buffer. No penalty applies, but no deduction for the excess.
rrspEstimator.overContributionWarning: You are {amount} over your contribution room (exceeding the $2,000 buffer). A penalty of 1% per month applies to the excess amount. Consider withdrawing the excess.
rrspEstimator.enterIncome: Enter your previous year's earned income to estimate your RRSP contribution room.
